creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
living my best life in @visitmalta 🇲🇹 from the dramatic abyss of the blue hole to the electric calm of the blue lagoon & the cathedral-like silence of seacaves Malta’s coastline is a masterpiece in three acts of blue ✨🚤🏞️💎💦✨ #visitmalta #exploremalta 

📍at heart of the Mediterranean Sea, just off the coast of Malta, the blue hole at Dwerja bay at Gozo Islands 💦

📍Sailing from the otherworldly Blue Lagoon on Comino to the echoing sea caves, you don’t just see the clarity—you feel it, as if your boat is floating on air 💦

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #bluelagoonmalta #gozoisland #dwejra #blueholegozo #马耳他 #insta360X5 #insta360mysg

transcription.text: You are not around, we're slowly drifting away Wave after wave, wave after wave We're slowly drifting away And it feels like we're drowning Pulling against the street, pulling against the wave Wave after wave, wave after wave We're slowly drifting away And it feels like we're drowning
